---
title: "debug_db.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/debug_db.ts"
loc: 18
complexity: 1
logic_score: 9.13
style_score: 3.75
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 4.93
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 9.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://better-sqlite3)

### Exports
- `db`
- `table`
